description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the viraweb/mblowfish-angularjs-builder:1.0.0 Docker image and caches the node_modules directory. Define two stages, build and deploy. In the build stage add a grunt_build job that runs only on the master and develop branches, executes npm install, bower install --allow-root --no-interactive, chmod 777 -fR ., su builder -c "grunt", and then pipes all lcov.info files to node_modules/.bin/codacy-coverage -t $CODACY_PROJECT_TOKEN, and publishes the generated ./${CI_PROJECT_NAME}.zip and ./doc as artifacts while capturing coverage with the pattern /Lines\s*:\s*(\d+\.\d+)%/. In the deploy stage add a marketplace_deploy job that runs only on master, runs npm install, bower install --allow-root --no-interactive, chmod 777 -fR ., su builder -c "grunt build", and uploads the zip artifact via curl to https://hub.viraweb123.ir/api/v2/marketplace/spas/token-$MARKETPLACE_TOKEN.
